final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed Oriental fragrance brand.

Style/medium: brand identity style guide / specification sheet, flat editorial layout with ink-wash texture accents
Composition: structured spec-sheet layout — primary color swatches row, secondary color swatches row, typography specimens section, brand name lockup; clean grid with generous white space
Subject: color system and typeface standards for 染秋 (RAN QIU); brand rooted in Chinese dyeing craft aesthetics, autumn botanicals (桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶) and Oriental spices (肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀); fragrance lines 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: off-white or warm rice-paper tone background evoking traditional Chinese paper
Lighting/mood: calm, poetic, warm — Eastern philosophical contemplation of seasonal change; 温暖治愈
Color palette: Primary colors — deep persimmon red (柿红), aged amber (琥珀金), ink-smoke charcoal (墨灰); Secondary / accent colors — osmanthus pale gold (桂花米金), maple rust orange (枫叶锈橙), oolong mist sage (乌龙烟青), frost white (柿霜白); all swatches shown with hex / RGB / CMYK labels
Materials/textures: subtle ink-wash wash behind swatches, fine-grain rice-paper texture on background
Text (verbatim): 染秋, RAN QIU, 主色, 辅色, 字体规范
Constraints: all color swatches must display color name (Chinese + English), hex code, and RGB value; typography section must show both Chinese typeface specimen and Latin typeface specimen; brand name 染秋 (RAN QIU) must appear as lockup
Avoid: Western minimalist tech-brand aesthetic, neon or overly saturated tones, generic Pantone-card clone layout without Eastern character
